hero.sub: A small drop. Made in New York. Available now.
hero.photo_credit: Photo by Lauren Fleischmann on Unsplash

copy.secondary_cta: Free shipping over $250 — Spring drop live

services.title: The Edit (curated drops)
services.blurb: Quarterly seasonal drops curated by our buying team. Each drop is small — fewer than 30 pieces — and most pieces are made in limited runs that do not restock. Sign up for first-look access via our member list (no spam, four sends per year).

services.title: Atelier (made-to-order)
services.blurb: Tailored versions of select pieces from our SoHo atelier. Three-week production from order to delivery. Custom measurements, fabric selection from our European mill partners, and one round of revisions included. The way garments used to be bought.

services.title: Archive (past-season)
services.blurb: Limited remaining inventory from past drops, available at the original price. Sizes are typically incomplete. We do not discount our archive — the work was correctly priced when it was made.

services.title: Objects (home + accessories)
services.blurb: A small collection of objects designed in-house and produced in collaboration with NYC and Italian craft partners — leather goods, ceramic vessels, hand-thrown brass hardware. Released alongside seasonal drops, sometimes as standalone editions.

services.title: Memberships (early access)
services.blurb: Annual memberships unlock 24-hour early access to drops, tailored atelier pricing, and an annual member-only object. $295 per year. Membership is the only way to reliably acquire pieces from the smallest drops — the Spring 2025 Counter coat sold out in 11 minutes.

services.title: The Journal (editorial)
services.blurb: An editorial publication twice a year — print and digital — exploring craft, design, and the cities where our work is made. Photographed and written by our in-house team and contributors. Free to members; available at our SoHo flagship for $24 per issue.

process.title: Drop release
process.blurb: Quarterly drops launch on the first Tuesday of February, May, August, and November at 10:00 AM Eastern. Members receive 24-hour early access.

process.title: Order + production
process.blurb: Stock pieces ship within three business days from our Brooklyn fulfillment. Atelier (made-to-order) ships in three weeks.

process.title: Returns + alterations
process.blurb: Free returns within 30 days for stock pieces. Atelier pieces are non-returnable but include one round of complimentary alterations within 60 days of receipt.

process.title: Member journal
process.blurb: Two issues per year — Spring and Fall. Print issues mailed to members. Digital companion available year-round.

case_study.title: Spring 2025 Counter Coat — 11-Minute Sellout
case_study.quote: I have been wearing the brand for five years and I own six pieces. The Counter coat sold out in eleven minutes — and somehow my membership came through. The garments age beautifully and I am still wearing pieces from 2021. Worth the membership three times over.

testimonials.quote: I have been wearing the brand for five years and I own six pieces. The garments age beautifully — I am still wearing pieces from 2021. The membership comes through every drop and that is the assignment.
testimonials.name: Sloane G.

testimonials.quote: Highsnobiety profile-piece subject in 2025. The brand is doing the kind of work that the New York fashion scene used to do — small, careful, considered. Press loves them because the garments are real.
testimonials.name: Editor at Vogue

testimonials.quote: I style for editorial and television and the brand has been on three of my last six covers. The pieces photograph beautifully and the production team is genuinely a pleasure to work with. Permanent on my pull list.
testimonials.name: Camille J.

faqs.a: European fit — slightly slimmer than typical American RTW. We publish a detailed sizing guide and recommend ordering one size up from your usual American size for most silhouettes. Atelier pieces are cut to your measurements and bypass sizing entirely.

85% in New York City — primarily our SoHo atelier and our Garment District manufacturing partner. The remaining 15% are made in collaboration with European mills (knits in Italy, denim in Japan, leather goods in Italy). Country of origin and atelier name are listed on every product page.

Free returns within 30 days for stock pieces. Atelier (made-to-order) pieces are non-returnable but include one round of complimentary alterations within 60 days. Sale items are final. We make returns easy because the garments are designed to live with you for years — not weeks.

Yes. One round of complimentary alterations is included with every atelier piece. For stock pieces purchased at retail, we offer alterations through our SoHo atelier at-cost — typically $40 to $90 depending on the alteration. Off-site alterations partners are listed on our care page for clients outside NYC.

Yes. Carbon-offset on every order via verified offset partner Wren. Recyclable packaging — no plastic. Domestic orders ship via UPS ground, international via DHL Express. We are a Certified B Corp and our supply-chain disclosures are public.

Quarterly drops on the first Tuesday of February, May, August, November at 10:00 AM Eastern. Most pieces do not restock — production runs are intentionally small. Members receive 24-hour early access. Sign up for the member list for first-look notifications without commitment.
Yes. Express international shipping via DHL with all duties and taxes calculated at checkout — no surprise customs invoices. Free international shipping on orders over $500.

127 Spring Street, between Greene and Wooster. Open Tuesday through Saturday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM. The atelier appointment desk is in the rear of the flagship. Atelier appointments are available by reservation only.

lead_magnet.title: The Studio Edit Guide to Caring for Made-in-New-York Garments
lead_magnet.subtitle: How to make a small wardrobe last — washing, storage, and alterations. 16 pages.
